summary: Iteration 59 - CI Color Migration from Coral (#ff9b7a) to Dutch Orange (#FF6B00) - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: 1) Landing page renders with orange CI (hero text, buttons, 3D particles), 2) Admin login 2-step flow works, 3) Admin dashboard displays correct stats (72 leads, 27 bookings, 3 chats), 4) All admin navigation views accessible, 5) Outbound Lead Machine pipeline stats, 6) Contract creation with value calculation (net, VAT 21%, gross), 7) Public contract acceptance page /vertrag renders, 8) Projects CRUD works, 9) Security headers present, 10) Health endpoint healthy. CI Migration verified: 0 coral/salmon colors remaining, Orange #FF6B00 used throughout, Button text is white on orange.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing page, Login flow, Admin dashboard, Contract acceptance page all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test contract and project via API for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 59 verified CI color migration from coral (#ff9b7a) to Dutch Orange (#FF6B00). All 293+ color references replaced. CSS variables in index.css: --nx-accent: #FF6B00, --nx-accent-h: #FF8533. Admin.css buttons use orange + white text. No coral/salmon colors remain in codebase (grep verified 0 occurrences). EUR only, no dollar signs.
